entries.reason: The 14-file product diff has one control-plane intent: docs define the authority lineage, runtime enforces it, tests prove it, and registries declare its ownership. The independent current-HEAD judge found the split-plan advisory lanes are review views, not unrelated scope.
entries.note: Advisory precedent only; matching this fingerprint never auto-closes future gates.
